title: CntierTagger
description: A mod that fetch and display tiers on Chinese  1.9+ PVP TierList
body:
This mod will fetch and cache [Chinese 1.9+ TierList](https://cntier.win/) The data is displayed in front of the corresponding player's nametag according to the player's settings.

[Cloth-Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) are required.

You can open the configuration screen in the Mod Menu.

You can view the detailed data of a specific player by using the command `/cntier <player_name>`
